cases.title: The rubber-stamp PR
cases.situation: A 500-line PR was approved 30 seconds after opening with 'LGTM'
cases.what_was_learned: Approval speed inversely correlates with review quality for large PRs. A meaningful review of 500 lines requires at least several minutes.

cases.title: The style obsessive
cases.situation: Review had 15 comments — all about semicolons, import order, and variable naming. Zero comments on the actual algorithm change.
cases.what_was_learned: Style-only feedback is a signal of review avoidance. The reviewer is engaging with the low-risk surface instead of the high-risk logic.
